description_long: This guard rail consists of a series of parallel, horizontal metal bars supported by two vertical posts at each end. The bars are evenly spaced and appear to be made of tubular steel, providing a sturdy barrier. The ends of the posts are slightly curved outward, which may help prevent snagging or injury. The overall finish is a uniform, dark metallic color, likely powder-coated for weather resistance. There are no visible decorative elements, reflective markings, or additional attachments. The design is utilitarian, suitable for use along roadsides, parking lots, or pedestrian walkways to prevent vehicles or people from crossing into restricted areas.
description: A dark, tubular metal guard rail with five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, designed for robust urban barrier use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts, highlighting the full width and spacing.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the rail, with only the thickness of the posts and bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the horizontal bars and posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the bars and posts.
